title: Quotes and Invoice feature in WM to add as file column
excerpt: Hey , i was having trouble to migrate from WM to CRM . We have been using the quotes and invoice feature in WM which is going to get deprecated in future. There is anyway we could reflect or show the quote as a file colu…

posts.author: Nikhilltiwari (Nikhil)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey , i was having trouble to migrate from WM to CRM . We have been using the quotes and invoice feature in WM which is going to get deprecated in future. There is anyway we could reflect or show the quote as a file column in the item so we could create an app and transfer it to the CRM in different account now. As rightnow it is not showing while creating an app and transferring. Please respond this is an emergency.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: You’d have to download the quote on each item and then upload to a file column?
